rationale: Educ. Code §29.310 governs assessment and placement of students who are deaf or hard of hearing. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Procedures and materials for assessment and placement of students who are deaf or hard of hearing shall be selected and administered so as not to be racially, culturally, or sexually discriminatory.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses special education assessment, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
